title: TimeRounding
description: Specifies how a calculated time should be rounded, including both the direction of rounding and the unit to which the time is rounded. Rounding is applied after all offsets have been calculated.

roundingDirection.description: The direction in which rounding is performed (e.g., up, down, or to the nearest value).

roundToUnit.description: The time unit to which the value should be rounded (e.g., minute, hour, day).
